exemplar.title: Â¿De que manera utiliza Carlos Ruiz ZafÃ³n el simbolismo de las mariposas negras en su novela Marina para representar la muerte, el destino y la transformaciÃ³n?

subject.title: Spanish ab initio
subject.description:
IB Spanish ab initio is a Group 2 subject in the International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP). Designed for students with little to no prior experience in Spanish, this beginner-level language acquisition course develops basic communicative competence across speaking, listening, reading, and writing skills. The course explores themes including identities, experiences, human ingenuity, social organization, and sharing the planet, while fostering intercultural understanding and effective communication in diverse Spanish-speaking contexts.

The course is available at Standard Level only (SL, 150 teaching hours), with first assessment in 2027.

Assessment consists of Paper 1 (Writing tasks of 70-150 words: SL 1 hour, 25%), Paper 2 (Listening and reading comprehension with unseen texts: SL 1 hour 45 minutes, 50%), and Internal Assessment (Individual oral examination based on visual stimulus with follow-up discussion: SL 7-10 minutes, 25%).

strengths: The topic is communicated accurately and effectively with clear and appropriate purpose and focus throughout the report.
The research question is clearly stated, sharply delimited to a single symbol in Marina, and revisited effectively in the conclusion.
Section headings and topic sentences sustain focus consistently, reinforcing the investigationâs coherence.
weaknesses: There is no dedicated methodology section outlining how or why sources were selected.
The process for evaluating or filtering sources (e.g., theoretical versus popular-web materials) is not made explicit.
Occasional digressions into broader Gothic history momentarily detract from the central focus on the mariposa negra.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work meets all top-band descriptors for communicating topic purpose and focus and for RQ clarity. While methodology evidence is partialâlacking a standalone sectionâthe sustained focus and precision in framing the study justify awarding the full 6 points in Focus and Method.

strengths: Source material is applied clearly and purposefully to support analysis of the symbol.
Subject knowledge of Gothic conventions, ZafÃ³nâs biography, and symbolic theory is coherent and well-anchored in textual evidence.
Terminology and theoretical concepts are used accurately and consistently throughout.
weaknesses: A few citations (e.g., blog reviews) have limited scholarly weight and minor formatting flaws.
The biographical context of ZafÃ³n could be more tightly linked to the symbolism analysis.
Some secondary sources (e.g., informal web articles) reduce the overall scholarly rigor.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student consistently applies relevant primary and secondary sources, demonstrates clear and coherent subject knowledge, and uses disciplinary terminology effectively. Minor citation issues and occasional reliance on less-rigorous sources preclude the absolute top mark, placing this criterion at 5 out of 6.

strengths: Research consistently aligns with the research question, drawing on a solid mix of primary and secondary materials.
Analysis moves beyond summary to map the symbolâs appearances onto thematic and character developments.
The argument is logically structured, with coherent discussion of limitations and avenues for further study.
weaknesses: Depth of source evaluation is limited; reliability and critical authority of some materials are not fully interrogated.
Counter-arguments and alternative readings of the symbol are scarce.
At times, narrative summary (particularly of novel plot) undercuts analytic focus.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation demonstrates strong, relevant research and effective analytical depth, situating it in the upper second band (10â12). Some inconsistencies in source evaluation and insufficient engagement with counter-readings prevent the absolute top score, but the overall quality of critical thinking merits 10 out of 12.

strengths: The report follows a complete and logical EE structure, including title page, table of contents, clear chapter divisions, conclusion, and bibliography.
Pagination and consistent heading hierarchy aid navigation and readability.
Layout elements such as section breaks and contents organization are generally well applied.
weaknesses: Visible artefacts (LaTeX remnants, brace-delimited codes) and minor line-break inconsistencies appear in places.
Citation style is uneven, with occasional missing page references.
Some dense paragraphs would benefit from subdivision to improve clarity.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All required presentation elements are present and effectively ordered, and layout conventions are broadly met. Minor formatting artefacts and citation inconsistencies do not significantly impede readability, justifying the top band score of 4 out of 4.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research question is explicitly stated twice, is sharply delimited to one symbol in a single novel, and is revisited in the conclusion.  Connection to subsequent discussion is generally tight; however, occasional digressions into broad history of Gothic fiction show the focus slipping slightly.  This places the work solidly in the top band, but at the lower end of it.

Analysis moves beyond summary, tracing how each appearance of the mariposa negra maps onto character arcs and thematic strands.  The student links symbolic theory to textual passages and offers reasoned interpretations.  Argumentation is good but not always incisively criticalâcounter-readings are scarceâso the lower end of 7-9 is appropriate.

Quotations from the primary text are integrated to support every analytical claim, and secondary sources (Lotman, Ricoeur, LÃ³pez, Ruiz Tosaus, etc.) are applied directly to the research question.  Despite minor citation flaws, the material chosen is consistently pertinent and used purposefully, meriting the top band but not full marks because some sources (e.g., blog reviews) add limited scholarly weight.

Layouts such as table formatting and section dividers are serviceable, but there are visible artefacts (brace-delimited page codes, inconsistent line-breaks, LaTeX remnants) and citation style is uneven.  These minor flaws prevent awarding the top band but basic layout requirements are still broadly met.

The student demonstrates confident knowledge of Gothic conventions, ZafÃ³nâs biography and the theoretical concept of symbol.  Explanations of each theme (muerte, destino, transformaciÃ³n) are coherent and correctly anchored in textual evidence, showing depth expected at this level.

The work follows a clear EE structure: title page with word count, contents page, introduction, chapter divisions, conclusion and bibliography.  Pagination is present, and headings aid navigation.  All required elements appear complete and appropriately ordered.

The investigation draws on a respectable mix of primary text analysis and 10+ secondary sources, most of which relate directly to symbolism or Gothic literature, demonstrating clear relevance.  Breadth is sound rather than exhaustive and critical authority of some web articles is limited, so the mark sits at the bottom of the 7-9 band.

The title, abstract-like opening, and repeated framing of the study around âla mariposa negraâ leave no doubt about the essayâs focus on death, destiny and transformation in Marina.  The student sustains this focus consistently through section headings and topic sentences, so purpose and scope are wholly appropriate and communicated with precision.  Minor stylistic over-embellishment does not impede clarity, therefore the highest band is warranted.

The essay sustains a logical line of reasoning from introduction to conclusion, and evaluative comments (e.g., limitations of Kolvenikâs quest, open areas for further study) are present.  Nonetheless, evaluation of source reliability is minimal and some assertions remain unchallenged, so the top of the 4-6 band is the best fit rather than entry into 7-9.

A bibliography of sixteen sources and repeated in-text citations display informed selection, but there is no dedicated methodology section and the process of choosing or evaluating sources is not explained.  While the range of criticism and theory is suitable, evidence of systematic data-gathering or evaluation is only partial, justifying the middle bandâs upper mark.

Technical vocabulary such as âsÃ­mboloâ, âpresagioâ, âmetamorfosisâ, ânodo semÃ¡nticoâ and âliteratura gÃ³ticaâ is used accurately and repeatedly.  The student applies theoretical terms (e.g., âunidad semÃ¡nticaâ, âtranscender lo literalâ) with consistency, evidencing secure command of disciplinary language.

annotations.comment: The title is clearly stated at the start, immediately establishing the investigationâs focus and satisfying the formatting requirements.
The research question is explicitly stated and sharply focused on a single symbol in Marina, strengthening its connection to subsequent analysis.
Including the word count on the title page demonstrates compliance with the word-limit requirement.
The table of contents is complete and clearly ordered, providing an effective roadmap for readers.
Page numbers are not visibly indicated in the footer; adding them consistently would improve navigation.
The opening paragraph is vivid and engaging, effectively setting a gothic tone, but consider tightening the language for a more academic style.
The biographical context on ZafÃ³n showcases subject knowledge, but it would strengthen the study to link this paragraph directly to the symbolism analysis.
A dedicated methodology section is missing; consider briefly outlining source selection criteria to demonstrate systematic research.
The research question is effectively restated at the end of the introduction, reinforcing the studyâs focus and cohesion.
Citation style in the paragraph on LÃ³pez Santos is inconsistent; ensure all in-text references follow a unified author-date format.
The integration of Lotmanâs and Ricoeurâs definitions demonstrates clear and coherent subject knowledge of symbolic theory.
Clarify why Lotman and Ricoeur were selected for this investigation to strengthen the methodology description.
Ensure all references within this theoretical framework adhere to the same citation style to maintain presentation consistency.
The historical context of Gothic literature is well explained but would benefit from a precise page reference for LÃ³pez (2008).
A stray page number â5â appears within the body text; remove such artefacts to ensure clean formatting.
The discussion of Gothic conventions displays mastery of terminology and effective use of LÃ³pezâs scholarship.
Integrating cross-cultural symbolism enriches analysis, showing a broader critical perspective beyond the primary text.
This paragraph is quite dense; consider breaking it into smaller sections to improve readability.
While cultural examples are illuminating, explicitly tie each back to the mariposa negraâs role in Marina to maintain focus.
The chapter heading clearly delineates the shift to symbol analysis, improving the essayâs structure.
The narrative summary of Marina could be more concise; focus on analysis rather than plot recapitulation.
Consider incorporating direct quotations from the primary text in this discussion of transformation to substantiate claims.
This paragraph trails off without completing the promised example; finish the sentence and supply the relevant textual evidence.
Balancing extensive quotations with paraphrase and analysis will help maintain the essayâs scholarly tone.
Consider paraphrasing parts of the long block quote to maintain readability and analytical focus.
The heading for sub-section 2.2 is clear, but ensure consistent use of heading levels throughout the essay.
The connection between the mariposa negra and the theme of death is lucidly articulated, demonstrating clear application of source material.
